name: Cheddar Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Set out a heavy skillet.
2. Put the grated Cheddar Cheese in a bowl and add the sour cream and egg yolks, mixing well after each addition.
3. Add the flour, salt, thyme, and dry mustard (mixed well in a separate bowl or cup) to the cheese mixture.
4. Melt the butter in the skillet over low heat.
5. Drop the batter by teaspoon into the skillet using a spatula.
6. Cook over medium heat until lightly browned on the bottom.
7. Loosen the edges with a spatula, turn and lightly brown the other side.
8. Serve immediately with bacon or pork sausage.
Makes about 2 dozen 3-inch cakes.
